title: cocculus limacia
intro: Cocculus limacia, also known as the Indian Berry or Pacific Yew, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, recognized by its small, yellowish-green berries. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancerous effects. The health benefits of Cocculus limacia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
